title: Seefor
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Character |type=Galactic Republic |image= |name=Seefor
CT-12/74 |homeworld=[[Kamino/Legends|Kamino]]{{DB|organization|clonetroopers|clone troopers}} |birth= |death= |species=[[Human/Legends|Human]] {{C|[[Cloning/Legends|clone]]}} |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Male]] |pronouns=He/him''[[The Cestus Deception]]'' |donor=[[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]] |height=1.83 [[Meter/Legends|meters]] |mass= |hair=[[Color/Legends|Black]] |feathers= |eyes=Brown |skin= |cyber= |families= |parents= |partners= |siblings= |children= |affiliation=*[[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] **[[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]] |masters= |apprentices= }} '''Seefor''', designated '''CT-12/74''', was a [[Clone commando/Legends|Clone Commando]] in the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic's]] [[Ord Cestus Squad|squad]] on [[Ord Cestus/Legends|Ord Cestus]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. He was a communications expert. Along with fellow clone commandos [[Forry]] and [[Sirty]], Seefor attempted to stop [[Alpha-class Advanced Recon Commando|Alpha-class ARC]] [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Jangotat|Nate]] from violating their code, which Nate was doing by not following the instructions that [[Jedi General/Legends|Generals]] [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Kenobi]] and [[Kit Fisto/Legends|Fisto]] gave them. {{Char-stub}} ==Appearances== *''[[The Cestus Deception]]'' {{1st}} *[[The Cestus Deception (abridged audiobook)|''The Cestus Deception'' abridged audiobook]] ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=CT-12/74 }} [[Category:Clone commandos]] [[Category:Individuals with he/him pronouns]] [[Category:Males]]
